acceptance_criteria: Submitting a query calls the /query API and renders the returned answer with clickable/visible cited file paths.
test_spec: Component test (React Testing Library) mocking the /query response, asserting the answer text and citation list render correctly.

files_changed.note: Full rewrite: form state (queryText/status/result/errorMessage), handleSubmit posts to /query via fetch, renders answer + citations as react-router-dom Links.
New file, 3 tests: submit+render answer/citations, error path renders query-error, empty query does not call fetch.

files_changed.lines_changed: routes array /query row (statusTestId), and the root-redirect test's final assertion
files_changed.note: Dependent fix: query-status -> query-form, since QueryView no longer calls fetchQueryResult on mount.
Regenerated by npm install for the above devDependency.

api_contract_reference: api/routes/query.go: POST /query {query, history?} -> 200 {answer, citations[]}; 4xx/5xx plain-text error body.
not_in_scope_for_verifier_to_flag_as_mis: 6.1.3 GraphView, 6.1.4 FilesAdminView, 6.1.5 e2e smoke test -- separate subtasks, untouched
Real backend wiring behind /query (api/routes/query.go's own disclosed 'Real-wiring gap': QueryPipeline interface not yet backed by a live gRPC/HTTP client) -- out of scope for a ui/-only subtask
